allow:
Bash(git -C /Users/thinkindave/TrueReturn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add projections, 3-column layout, and updated defaults

- Switch to 3-column top row \(Property Details, Breakdown, Results\)
  with full-width Projections section below
- Add 5yr and 10yr projections: property value, capital growth,
  remaining loan, equity, estimated rent and cash flow
- Rent and expenses projected based on expected annual growth
- P&I loan balance reduces over time in equity calculation
- Add Cash Flow sub-sections within projections
- Update defaults to QLD property: $295k, 5.89% P&I, 6.6% mgmt, $420/wk

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git -C /Users/thinkindave/TrueReturn commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add yield notes, principal paid down, and projection refinements

- Add explanatory notes under Gross Yield and Net Yield results
- Add Principal Paid Down line to 5yr and 10yr projections
- Add disclaimer note under Expected Annual Growth input
- Make Remaining Loan same size as other projection rows
- Remove sticky positioning from Results section

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
